query.query_string: Insulin aspart AND permanent neonatal diabetes mellitus

data.query: Insulin aspart AND permanent neonatal diabetes mellitus

results.title: Insulin therapy in neonatal diabetes mellitus: a review of the literature.
results.abstract: Neonatal diabetes mellitus (NDM) is a rare disorder, and guidance is limited regarding its optimal management. We reviewed insulin usage in NDM, with a focus on continuous subcutaneous insulin infusion (CSII).
